instructions.purpose: Search through stored conversation memories to recall past messages, preferences, or information shared by the user. Use this tool when the user asks about something they previously mentioned, or when recalling past context would improve your response.

tool.name: search-memory
tool.description: Queries the memory database for the current conversation. The chat context is handled automatically - you only need to provide optional filters. Results are sorted by importance (high first), then by last read date, then by creation date. Returns the matching memories or an empty list if nothing is found.

instructions.response_handling: If the search is not needed or no memories match the query, return an empty array or do not call the tool. Do not fabricate memories.
instructions.filter_priority: Prefer the following order of filters, but you do not need to use a previous filter to use the next one: 1. searchString - partial text match on message content 2. timeRange - filter by creation date range (start and end in ISO 8601 format) 3. limit - cap the number of results 4. importance - filter by one or more importance levels (low, medium, high)

usage_rules.rule: Only call this tool when the user explicitly asks about past information or when recalling context is essential
Use searchString to narrow results when the user references a specific topic
Use timeRange when the user mentions a specific time period
Use limit to avoid overwhelming context with too many results (prefer 5-10)
Use importance to prioritize high-value memories when the query is broad
When no filters are needed, simply return an empty array or do not call the tool

example.context: User says: "Przypomnij mi co mówiłem o moim ulubionym jedzeniu"
example.reasoning: Search for memories mentioning favorite food, limited to 5 results.

example.context: User says: "What did I tell you about my job last week?"
example.reasoning: User is asking about work-related information from last week. Search with text filter and time range.
Casual greeting with no need to search past memories. Do not call the search tool.
